name: Longest palindromic subsequence
statement:
Given a string, Find the longest palindromic subsequence length in given string.


A palindrome is a sequence that reads the same backwards as forward.

A subsequence is a sequence that can be derived from another sequence by deleting some or no elements without changing the order of the remaining elements.

examples.explanation: The longest palindromic subsequence is "eeee", which has a length of 4.
The longest palindromic subsequence is "nn", which has a length of 2.
